message:
fix(core): add #[serial] to debug mode tests to prevent race conditions

Tests modifying global DEBUG_MODE_ENABLED were failing intermittently
due to parallel execution. Added serial_test dependency and #[serial]
attribute to all tests that modify debug state.

Also syncs beads: closed 12 already-implemented beads including
integration tests, connection handling, BasicAuth, config system,
Validate macro, security tests, error tests, response tests, and
lifecycle tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
